bibleCharacters.name: Adam
bibleCharacters.meaning: first human created by God, ancestor of humanity

bibleCharacters.name: Eve
bibleCharacters.meaning: mother of all living

bibleCharacters.name: Noah
bibleCharacters.meaning: righteous man preserved through the flood

bibleCharacters.name: Abraham
bibleCharacters.meaning: father of a multitude and patriarch of Israel

bibleCharacters.name: Sarah
bibleCharacters.meaning: wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac

bibleCharacters.name: Isaac
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Abraham through whom covenant continues

bibleCharacters.name: Jacob
bibleCharacters.meaning: patriarch renamed Israel, father of the twelve tribes

bibleCharacters.name: Joseph
bibleCharacters.meaning: son of Jacob who became ruler in Egypt

bibleCharacters.name: Moses
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet who delivered Israel and gave the law

bibleCharacters.name: Aaron
bibleCharacters.meaning: brother of Moses and first high priest

bibleCharacters.name: Joshua
bibleCharacters.meaning: successor of Moses who led Israel into the land

bibleCharacters.name: Deborah
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophetess and judge who led Israel to victory

bibleCharacters.name: Gideon
bibleCharacters.meaning: judge who defeated Midian with a small army

bibleCharacters.name: Samson
bibleCharacters.meaning: judge known for extraordinary strength

bibleCharacters.name: Ruth
bibleCharacters.meaning: Moabite woman who became ancestor of David

bibleCharacters.name: Samuel
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet who anointed Israel's kings

bibleCharacters.name: Saul
bibleCharacters.meaning: first king of Israel

bibleCharacters.name: David
bibleCharacters.meaning: king of Israel and ancestor of Messiah

bibleCharacters.name: Solomon
bibleCharacters.meaning: king known for wisdom who built the temple

bibleCharacters.name: Elijah
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet who confronted Baal worship

bibleCharacters.name: Elisha
bibleCharacters.meaning: successor of Elijah performing miracles

bibleCharacters.name: Isaiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet foretelling the coming Messiah

bibleCharacters.name: Jeremiah
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet warning Judah before exile

bibleCharacters.name: Ezekiel
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet receiving visions in exile

bibleCharacters.name: Daniel
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet known for faith and visions

bibleCharacters.name: Mary
bibleCharacters.meaning: mother of Jesus the Messiah

bibleCharacters.name: Joseph
bibleCharacters.meaning: earthly guardian of Jesus

bibleCharacters.name: John the Baptist
bibleCharacters.meaning: prophet preparing the way for Christ

bibleCharacters.name: Jesus
bibleCharacters.meaning: Son of God and Savior of the world

bibleCharacters.name: Peter
bibleCharacters.meaning: leading apostle among the disciples

bibleCharacters.name: Andrew
bibleCharacters.meaning: disciple who brought others to Jesus

bibleCharacters.name: James
bibleCharacters.meaning: apostle and early martyr

bibleCharacters.name: John
bibleCharacters.meaning: apostle and gospel writer

bibleCharacters.name: Matthew
bibleCharacters.meaning: apostle and author of Matthew

bibleCharacters.name: Thomas
bibleCharacters.meaning: disciple who later confessed faith

bibleCharacters.name: Mary Magdalene
bibleCharacters.meaning: disciple who first saw the risen Christ

bibleCharacters.name: Lazarus
bibleCharacters.meaning: man raised from the dead by Jesus

bibleCharacters.name: Stephen
bibleCharacters.meaning: first Christian martyr

bibleCharacters.name: Barnabas
bibleCharacters.meaning: missionary companion of Paul

bibleCharacters.name: Paul
bibleCharacters.meaning: missionary apostle to the Gentiles

bibleCharacters.name: Timothy
bibleCharacters.meaning: disciple and coworker of Paul

bibleCharacters.name: Titus
bibleCharacters.meaning: trusted coworker of Paul

bibleCharacters.name: Luke
bibleCharacters.meaning: physician and author of Luke and Acts

bibleCharacters.name: Mark
bibleCharacters.meaning: companion of Peter and author of Mark

bibleCharacters.name: Pontius Pilate
bibleCharacters.meaning: Roman governor who authorized Jesus' crucifixion

bibleCharacters.name: Herod the Great
bibleCharacters.meaning: king ruling Judea at Jesus' birth

bibleCharacters.name: Cornelius
bibleCharacters.meaning: first major Gentile convert in Acts

bibleCharacters.name: Lydia
bibleCharacters.meaning: seller of purple cloth who believed the gospel

bibleCharacters.name: John (Revelation)
bibleCharacters.meaning: apostle receiving the Revelation visions
